title: Clair de Lune Standard Rocking Moses Basket Stand
features: GENTLE ROCKING MOTION - Smoothly rocks side to side to soothe your newborn baby to sleep at night.
NURSERY SPECIALISTS - Clair de Lune has been an award winning UK based nursery manufacturer since 1943. What we don't know about nursery goods just isn't worth knowing!
SECURE - Easy to assemble & with wooden retaining bars and adjustable straps to accommodate your Moses basket safely.
SPECIFICATIONS - Fits Moses baskets measuring length: 70-83.5 cm & width: 30-3 cm. Compatible with Clair de Lune Moses baskets, Noah Pods & Willow Bassinets.
SAFE SLEEPING - The Moses basket stand conforms to BS EN 1466:2014 and goes through rigorous quality checks before it leaves the building.
description: Product Description This sturdy pine wood Moses basket stand rocks gently side to side to soothe your little one to sleep at night. With a gentle push, you can cradle your baby as they drift away to sleep. Our 100% natural stand raises your baby to a height that is perfectly eye-level beside a standard bed, and allows you to be close to your little one at night. The straps are adjustable so you can change them to fit most standard palm and wicker Moses baskets, and the lightweight wood finish makes it easily portable around your home. Also compatible with other brands measuring: Length: 70 - 83.5 cm Width: 30 - 33.5 cm Height: 48.2 cm Conforms to BS EN 1466:2014. Note: Refer to instructions to correctly assemble this product. Do not use a Drill for assembly. Box Contains 1 x Stand
